An IT Support professional forged through years of hands-on infrastructure management across healthcare, automotive, and technology sectors. From assembling bare-metal systems to orchestrating complex hospital information systems, Rafe's career is a testament to technical versatility and operational excellence.

Skilled in hardware architecture, network engineering, medical lab software (LABMIS/LIS), and digital content ecosystems — currently advancing studies in Computer Science & Engineering while serving as IT Executive at Farazy Hospital Ltd.
